letter.content:
I wanted to write this properly, not as a text that gets buried in chat history, but as something you can come back to whenever you need a reminder.

First things first — yes, you never gave me a handshake or a hug. And honestly? That's completely not okay. I know you have your boundaries, your comfort zones, But even with me? you should be ashamed of that bro. I've never once held it against you, and I never will, but you? didn't even do a handshake? didn't even introduced me to one of your friends? not even a single outing planned by you? really?. Everyone expresses care differently, and the way you've shown me you care has meant a lot ot me, but i alos want the hugs and handshakes, and some more rights😘.

I don't know when it happened exactly. There wasn't a single moment where I thought "oh, this is it." It was gradual. It was in the way our conversations became the highlight of my day. It was in how "I love you" became a daily thing — something I started looking forward to, something that made my entire day better every single time.

You became special to me in the quietest way. No grand realization, no dramatic turning point. Just... one day I woke up and realized that you were the person I wanted to tell everything to. The good days, the bad days, the absolutely meaningless nonsense that nobody else would care about. All of it. You were the first person I thought of when something happened, and the person I wanted to share every moment with.

Our bond confuses me sometimes. We talk daily, we share everything, we say "I love you" like it's the most natural thing in the world. It already feels like more than friendship — it feels like we've been building something without even realizing it. Something that makes this whole "proposal" feel less like a question and more like... making things official. Paperwork, as I like to say.

You matter to me, Apoorva. Not in a casual way, not in a "you're my friend and that's nice" way. You matter in a way that makes me want to be better, to show up for you, to be the person you deserve. Whether that's as your best friend, your boyfriend, or something in between — I won't take a no for the answer, else me going away from you. Because having you in my life is non-negotiable at this point and if you reject then i don't want my feelings to be played with, so.. please.

So here's to whatever comes next. Whatever you decide, whoever you want me to be — I'm not here, i am going. You Can't get me back even if you tried.

Thank you for being you but now you need to be mine. Thank you for being in my life and i want you to stay forever. Thank you for being... well, mine in whatever way makes sense to you.

termsAndConditions.title: Terms & Conditions of Rejection
content: By rejecting Shashwat's proposal, you acknowledge that:
1. You Are Accepting That shashwat won't ever text you, call you or try to contact to you by any means
2. You won't any longer get any jokes, late night calls, fun replies, nothing
3. You understand that you're passing up on unlimited bad jokes, late-night rants, someone who actually listens, and genuine affection. Your loss, honestly.
4. You agree that Shashwat will be highly disappointed in you if you rejected? and that his heart might shatter also?
5. Shashwat Can go and talk to other girls now, and he can make rishika his bestfriend?(although he never wanted to, but you are forcing him to)
6. You understand that this is a one-way decision. Once you reject, there's no going back. No second chances, no "let's just be friends" option. It's a clean break. Sorry, not sorry.
7. Nothing can be changed after this point, right? no waiting for college, or the right age, nothing, okay??
8. Most importantly: You publically declare that you hate him right? there's no going back on it after this point. and even if you cry this time to revert things back it really won't work this time
By clicking 'I Accept', you confirm that you've read and understood these terms while knowing that Shashwat will never be there for you, no matter what.
termsAndConditions.acceptButtonText: I Accept These Terms And State It Publically That I Hate Shashwat

noResponse.reassuranceMessage: I want you to know something important. This changes everything between us. Not one bit. You were my favorite person to talk to, my go-to for random thoughts at 2 AM, and the person I want to share everything with. I valued our friendship more than any label could define. We were good. But you decided to reject me. We're no longer together, knowing your reply was hurtful, but okay, it was needed, now i won't text you ever, BYE!
noResponse.finalParagraph: Listen, Apoorva. The fact that you took the time to go through this entire ridiculous website says something. This Says That you can do so much efforts knowing the outcome just to hurt me, humiliate our friendship and go back on your texts of "I LOVE YOU" Or more like "I AM PLAYING WITH YOUR FEELINGS". I hope you understand that this is not just a simple rejection. This is a complete shutdown of everything we had. I won't be there for you anymore, not in any capacity. No more jokes, no more late-night conversations, no more caring about your day or your problems. You made your choice, and now you have to live with it. Goodbye, Apoorva. I hope you find someone else to talk to at 2 AM when you're feeling down, because it sure as hell won't be me. And Also.. you can now go to your other bestfriends sarvagy, saksham and Avi, and do whatever you want, i won't any longer advise you to stop, okay? happy? now you have to live with this reality, okay? BYE Forver!!!!!!!!!!!

yesResponse.doubtMessage: Are you actually sober right now? Did someone force you? Are you feeling okay? Did I just hallucinate that? This seems too good to be true... You do realize what you're agreeing to, right? Bad jokes, late-night conversations, someone who will annoy you with care and attention?

improveOptions.text: Stop doubting and kiss me already!

yesResponse.celebrationMessage: I've been waiting for this moment. No pressure, but I've been mentally planning this for way too long. Now... send me that photo I wanted 😋 only then your respone will be considered, else i am just going to consider it a big hurtful hate-filled no, okay?😘🥰🫶 My bbg would do this for me na?
yesResponse.finalNote: P.S. - You just made me the happiest person alive. No big deal. Just wanted you to know. 💕

emotionalSection.title: Real Talk...
paragraphs: I need you to know that this isn't some random impulse. I've thought about this. A lot. Probably more than is healthy. But when you know, you know. And I know.

You became special to me in the quietest way. No grand moment, no dramatic realization — just one day I woke up and realized you were the person I wanted to tell everything to. The good, the bad, the absolutely meaningless nonsense. All of it.
messages: I love your company more than anyone else's — and I actually like being alone, so that's saying something
The way you say 'I love you' daily hits different — every single time, without fail
You've already made it obvious how you feel — even if you don't see it yourself
Every moment with you feels like home — cheesy, but true
I don't want anyone else by my side — you've ruined me for everyone else honestly
You're the first person I want to share good news with
And somehow also the person I trust with my worst days
emotionalSection.handshakeNote: Also, it's okay that you never gave me a handshake or hug… I'll wait. For however long it takes. You're worth waiting for.

whySayYes.title: Why You Should Honestly Just Say Yes
whySayYes.subtitle: A completely unbiased list of reasons:

reasons.title: I already treat you like a priority
reasons.description: Your messages get answered first. Your problems become my problems. Your happiness is literally on my to-do list.

reasons.title: I will always listen to your nonsense
reasons.description: Even the dangerous ones. Even the 2 AM rants about things that don't matter. I'm invested in every random thought you have.

reasons.title: You are already my favorite notification
reasons.description: When my phone buzzes, I hope it's you. Every single time. You're the highlight of my day, every day.

reasons.title: I am not going anywhere
reasons.description: Through good days, bad days, and 'I don't want to talk to anyone' days. I'm here. Unshakeable. Annoyingly persistent.

reasons.title: I'll still annoy you, but now with love
reasons.description: All my irritating habits? They come with the package. But at least now you can officially roll your eyes at your boyfriend.

reasons.title: I'll be your biggest fan
reasons.description: Whatever you want to do, whoever you want to be — I'm in your corner. Always have been, always will be.

reasons.title: I am your sunflower
reasons.description: I will always be the top one if you like bottom, and am also okay with forced😘😘, just only with you

whySayYes.closingNote: Look, I'm not perfect. I have flaws. I can be annoying, dramatic, and occasionally too much. But I can promise you this: you will never wonder if you're loved. You'll never doubt if you matter. Because you do. More than you know. And i want that photo right now😘😘
